commands.name: create-post
commands.title: Create Post
commands.subtitle: Publish to X and Instagram
commands.description: Publish social media posts on configured platforms

commands.name: schedule-post
commands.title: Schedule Post
commands.subtitle: Post at a future time
commands.description: Schedule a social media post to be published at a future time

commands.name: scheduled-posts
commands.title: Scheduled Posts
commands.subtitle: View and manage scheduled posts
commands.description: View, delete or immediately publish your scheduled posts

preferences.name: instagramUserId
preferences.title: Instagram User ID
preferences.description: Your Instagram Business/Creator account user ID (numeric)

preferences.name: instagramAccessToken
preferences.title: Instagram Access Token
preferences.description: Long-lived Instagram Graph API access token from Meta for Developers

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
